plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs like SOXL and SPAL to reduce risk.
Trim QQQI and CRWD to make room for more conservative assets.
Reduce SPY to meet concentration limits and free up capital.
Buy XLV to add a defensive sector and increase diversification.
Initiate a position in METU as a strong, high-reward setup.
conservative.read: This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a target of around 1.5% monthly return. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration, holding a larger cash buffer for stability and lower potential drawdowns.

plan: Trim SOXL and exit SPAL to manage leveraged ETF exposure.
Reduce SPY and QQQ to lower overall index and concentration risk.
Trim SMH to decrease semiconductor sector concentration.
Add GOOGL for exposure to a strong tech name.
Initiate a position in RTX, a high-quality setup identified by the scanner.
balanced.read: This balanced approach aims for risk-first growth, targeting around 2.5% monthly. It reduces leverage and concentration while blending broad market exposure with quality tech and a few select setups, maintaining a moderate cash buffer.

plan: Increase exposure to SOXL, a high-conviction leveraged ETF.
Consider adding SPAL if conditions remain favorable.
Trim SPY to reduce broad market exposure and free up capital.
Increase SMH and CRWD to concentrate on high-growth sectors.
Add NET and GUSH, strong setups with high risk/reward potential.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets high growth, around 4% monthly, by leaning into leverage and concentration. It increases leveraged ETFs and high-conviction sectors, but this significantly raises potential drawdowns and is subject to leverage decay. Strict stop discipline is crucial.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs and high-beta single names like SOXL, SPAL, CRWD, and SMH.
Significantly increase QQQI to maximize income generation.
Add to SPY to capture potential broad market distributions.
Keep a substantial cash buffer for stability and future income opportunities.
Watch METU as a potential addition if its yield profile becomes attractive.
income.read: This income-focused plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and capital preservation, targeting around 1% monthly. It eliminates volatile assets, focusing on income-generating ETFs and broad market exposure, with a large cash buffer to minimize drawdowns.
